mapLoadFallback.title: Map unavailable right now
mapLoadFallback.message: This is a small personal project running on a free tier — today's map quota is used up. Come back tomorrow!
mapLoadFallback.timeoutMessage: The map is taking longer than usual — probably a slow connection. Give it another try.

mapLayers.title: Map layers
mapLayers.satelliteNote: These don't apply to satellite view — Google renders it as photo imagery only.
